description: R2a L3 record-type vectors. Each vector's expected was computed by the REAL al-sem L3 (indexWorkspace pre-resolve → resolveModel post-resolve/pre-summary → projectL3RecordTypes). Hand-authored invariants were asserted against the live projection before emit. Rust loads this committed file and asserts parity. Covers declared/quoted/temporary/unresolved vars, op-from-var, implicit Rec in Table/Page/TableExtension/PageExtension, never-override-explicit-local-Rec, merged extension fields, and a FIRST-wins duplicate-extension-field COLLISION.

vectors.name: a_declared_record_customer
vectors.description: `var c: Record Customer` resolves c.tableId to Customer's StableTableId
files: a
invariants: c resolves to Customer (50000)

vectors.name: b_quoted_sales_line
vectors.description: `var s: Record "Sales Line"` resolves via stripped quotes to Sales Line
files: b
invariants: s resolves to "Sales Line" (50001)

vectors.name: c_temporary_record
vectors.description: `Record Customer temporary` strips the modifier and resolves the table
files: c
invariants: temporary var t still resolves to Customer (50000)

vectors.name: d_unresolved_absent
vectors.description: a record var naming a table not in the workspace has tableId OMITTED
files: d
invariants: unresolved var x has NO tableId key
unresolved op x.Get has NO tableId key

vectors.name: e_op_tableid_from_var
vectors.description: a record op's tableId is derived from its declared record variable
files: e
invariants: c.FindSet op resolves to Customer (50000)
c.Modify op resolves to Customer (50000)

vectors.name: f_implicit_rec_table_trigger
vectors.description: bare `Modify;` / `Rec.Modify` in a Table trigger resolves Rec to the owning table
files: f
invariants: implicit Rec op resolves to the owning table (50000)
the matrix implicit-Rec definition holds (rec/xrec + tableId set)

vectors.name: g_implicit_rec_page_sourcetable
vectors.description: implicit Rec in a Page trigger resolves to the declared SourceTable
files: g
invariants: page implicit Rec resolves to SourceTable Customer (50000)

vectors.name: h_implicit_rec_tableextension_extends
vectors.description: implicit Rec in a TableExtension trigger resolves via the `extends` target to the BASE table
files: h
invariants: tableextension implicit Rec resolves to extended base Customer (50000)

vectors.name: i_implicit_rec_pageextension_chain
vectors.description: implicit Rec in a PageExtension resolves: extends → base page → its SourceTable → table
files: i
invariants: pageextension implicit Rec resolves via base page SourceTable → Customer (50000)

vectors.name: j_never_override_explicit_local_rec
vectors.description: a real local var named `Rec` typed as another table is NOT overridden by implicit Table-Rec resolution
files: j
invariants: explicit local Rec (Sales Line) wins over the owning table (Other 50002)
the local Rec var itself resolves to Sales Line (50001)

vectors.name: k_merged_extension_fields
vectors.description: a TableExtension extending an IN-WORKSPACE base table merges its fields onto the base table
files: k
invariants: base table has its 2 native + 2 merged extension fields
merged field 50000 carries TableExtension provenance (declaringObjectId)
native field 1 keeps the base Table provenance

vectors.name: l_collision_duplicate_extfield_number
vectors.description: two TableExtensions adding the SAME field number to one base table → mergeExtensionFields is FIRST-wins (the second is dropped)
files: l
invariants: field 50000 is FIRST-wins from Ext A (ingested first), Ext B's collision dropped
field 50001 (non-colliding, from Ext B) DOES merge
base table has exactly 2 native + 2 merged (50000 once, 50001) = 4 fields
